title: Children Law
description: Children Act, welfare and child arrangements.

questions.q: What is the court's paramount consideration in Children Act proceedings?
questions.explain: The child's welfare is the court's paramount consideration.
Section 8 includes child arrangements, prohibited steps and specific issue orders.

title: Financial Remedies
description: Section 25, needs, sharing, compensation and pensions.

questions.q: Which case is strongly associated with the modern sharing principle?
questions.explain: White v White is a key authority on fairness and sharing.

questions.q: What are the three strands often cited from Miller/McFarlane?
questions.explain: Needs, compensation and sharing are the recognised fairness strands.

title: TLATA
description: Trusts of land and beneficial interests.

topics.title: Beneficial Interests
topics.description: Constructive trust and proprietary estoppel basics.

questions.q: A common intention constructive trust usually requires common intention and what else?
questions.explain: Common intention and detrimental reliance are usually required.
